# evaluatePredicate(in:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the rule’s predicate has been satisfied in the context of the specified rule system.

## Declaration

```swift
func evaluatePredicate(in system: GKRuleSystem) -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the rule is satisfied (and its action should be executed); otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNSPredicateRule] class overrides this method to use its [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNSPredicateRule/predicate] property for testing the rule. Subclasses of [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNSPredicateRule] do not need to override this method.

## Evaluating a Rule

- **predicate**: A predicate to be tested when evaluating the rule.
